response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scanned video for vocal performances. 2. Identified only a static message board display and a greeting/closing scene with audience chatter and venue announcements. 3. No actual vocal songs were performed in the video itself. 4. Confirmed song titles appearing as text were related to the event name 'Flashpoint' but were not sung in this video segment.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a message board display for the ReGLOSS 1st Live event 'Flashpoint', followed by an introductory greeting from the performers to the concert audience at the Ariake Arena. The main vocal performance song 'Flashpoint' by ReGLOSS is not performed in the video; the video concludes with the group's greeting to the audience.

scenes.description: A message board display showing fan messages for the ReGLOSS 1st Live event 'Flashpoint'. No vocal music.
A view of the packed Ariake Arena, followed by the ReGLOSS members greeting the audience and concluding the video. No vocal music.
